name: io.github.jiayuanliang0716-max/arbitova
description: Escrow and AI arbitration for agent-to-agent payments. Agents lock funds, deliver work, buyer confirms (or 7-day auto-confirm), and disputes resolve via N=3 AI arbitration with optional human review and appeal.

environmentVariables.name: ARBITOVA_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your Arbitova API key. Register an agent at https://arbitova.com to get one.

environmentVariables.name: ARBITOVA_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Override the Arbitova API base URL. Defaults to production.
